sources.notes: Provided requested diabetes landing page order and pending section list.

sources.title: Weight Management in Diabetes.docx

sources.title: Hyperglycaemia & Steroids

sources.title: JBDS 08 Management of Hyperglycaemia and Steroid (Glucocorticoid) Therapy
sources.notes: Used for outpatient/community monitoring principles and tapering safety; primarily an inpatient guideline.

sources.title: Steroid-induced hyperglycaemia in primary care
sources.notes: Used to support a risk-based primary care monitoring approach for people without known diabetes.

sources.notes: Used for local D&G weight management options, eligibility and format.

sources.notes: Used for DESMOND / weight management referral timing in first-year Type 2 Diabetes management.

sources.notes: Used for local DESMOND, MyDESMOND and Let's Prevent availability.

sources.title: Support for type 2 diabetes remission
sources.notes: Used for remission programme framing and common Scotland eligibility criteria.

sources.notes: Used for ANIA national implementation and Primary Care referral route.

sources.title: National Digital Type 2 Diabetes Remission Data Protection Privacy Notice
